'''Richard Owen''' (born 25 April 1990) is an English former professional [[rugby league]] footballer who played as a {{rlp|fb}} or on the {{rlp|wg}}.

He has played for [[Featherstone Lions]] ALRFC, [[Westgate Redoubt]] ARLFC, [[Castleford Tigers]], [[Keighley Cougars]] ([[Loan (sports)|loan]]), [[Wakefield Trinity|Wakefield Trinity Wildcats]] (two spells, first one on [[Loan (sports)|loan]]), [[Leigh Centurions]] and [[Doncaster R.L.F.C.|Doncaster]] in [[League 1 (rugby league)|Kingstone Press League 1]].

==Background==
Owen was born in [[Normanton, West Yorkshire|Normanton]], [[West Yorkshire]], England.

==Career==
Owen made an impressive start to his Super League career for Castleford in 2008 - scoring 13 tries in 24 games. Due to the team suffering some key injuries he was moved to the wing and formed a good partnership with [[Michael Shenton]] towards the end of that year.

Owen played mainly at full back for the Castleford Tigers in 2009 where he showed some excellent form.

In round three of 2010 Richie suffered a badly broken leg against the [[Bradford Bulls]].

After signing a new two-year deal for the Castleford Tigers in 2010, Owen made a try scoring return for his club in a round eight victory over [[Hull F.C.|Hull FC]].

In May 2014, Owen joined [[Wakefield Trinity|Wakefield Trinity Wildcats]] on loan until the end of the season.<ref>{{cite web|title=Wakefield Trinity Wildcats sign Richard Owen from Castleford|url=https://www.bbc.co.uk/sport/rugby-league/27429395|website=BBC Sport|access-date=17 January 2015|date=15 May 2014}}</ref> In October 2014, he joined Wakefield Trinity Wildcats on a permanent deal, signing a three-year contract.<ref>{{cite web|title=Super League: Wakefield Wildcats complete signing of Richard Owen from Castleford|url=http://www1.skysports.com/rugby-league/news/12208/9525420/super-league-wakefield-sign-richard-owen-from-castleford|website=Sky Sports|access-date=17 January 2015|date=20 October 2014}}</ref>

He was a free agent having been released from his contract with the [[Wakefield Trinity|Wakefield Trinity Wildcats]] by mutual consent in 2016.

==Controversy==
In 2012 Owen was given a 12 months suspended sentence and ordered to complete 200 hours of community service for affray and actual bodily harm. The charges related to his role in a brawl outside a [[Pontefract]] nightclub the previous year. The court heard Owen punched a man dressed as [[Santa Claus]] who was rendered unconscious and sustained a fractured jaw as a result.<ref>{{cite web|title=Castleford fullback Richard Owen is sentenced after {{sic|assua|lting|nolink=y}} man dressed as Santa Claus|url=https://www.foxsports.com.au/nrl/castleford-fullback-richard-owen-is-sentenced-after-assualting-man-dressed-as-santa-claus/news-story/bf71bd55a90a8611c3efa0be881b6679?sv=c12d0841f147277fd1a9a3a665a30a3a|website=Fox Sports|access-date=24 May 2020|date=17 December 2012}}</ref>

Owen was remanded in custody between December 2016 and January 2017 on suspicion of three counts of sexual assault, actual bodily harm and theft. He was later cleared of all offences after being found not guilty in May 2017.<ref>{{cite web|title=Richard Owen: Rugby league player found not guilty of sex offences after trial|url=https://www.yorkshirepost.co.uk/news/crime/richard-owen-rugby-league-player-found-not-guilty-sex-offences-after-trial-1776601|website=Yorkshire Post|access-date=24 May 2020|date=24 May 2017}}</ref>
